category_sources: source_facts.description says an opinionated Scheme dialect for systems programming; official Gerbil site describes it as a modern Scheme implementation and systems language.
display_name_sources: Official cons.io homepage title is Gerbil Scheme; source_facts.name is gerbil-scheme.
docs_sources: Official Gerbil GitHub README says documentation is rendered online at cons.io; cons.io/reference identifies itself as the reference documentation for Gerbil.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/mighty-gerbils/gerbil; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists gxi and gxc; official cons.io homepage mentions Scheme, compiler, FFI, systems language, and standard library/reference documentation.
